contracts.name: arka

contracts.name: shareToken
contracts.deferredReason: Factory deploys per-Arka share tokens from uploaded wasm hash.

contracts.name: adapterBalanced
contracts.deferredReason: Balanced/SODAX uses intents SDK server-side, not this AMM-router adapter.

contracts.name: adapterBlend
contracts.deferredReason: Blend needs one adapter instance per pool; deploy named instances below.

contracts.name: coverageVault
contracts.deferredReason: Coverage vaults are per-manager instances, not a global singleton.

singletons: arkaToken.init(admin, name='Arka Fund', symbol='ARKA', decimals=7, max_supply=1000000000000000)
lockedArka.init(admin, token=arkaToken, min_lock_ledgers=120960, max_lock_ledgers=6307200, name='Locked Arka', symbol='lARKA')
venues: adapterPhoenix.set_pool_route for Phoenix XLM/USDC and USDC/XLM
adapterBalanced intentionally not deployed/configured for AUTO
oracle: oracleGuard.configure every asset policy before public deposits
Arka swap risk policy must point to OracleGuard before advertised execution
postDeployGates: Run storage lifecycle strict dry-run against deployments.mainnet.json
Run contract smoke tests on canary Arka with small capital
Run venue canaries before enabling AUTO on any protocol
Only enable public creation after creation fee and registry writer are confirmed

mainnetReleaseGate.scope: manual AMM venue launch; Balanced/SODAX AUTO requires production intent canary

findings: Official Stellar swaps are powered by SODAX Intents rather than a published Soroban AMM router.
The public SODAX SDK exposes quote, build, relay, submit, status, receipt, expiry and refund methods.
Arka mainnet canary proved quote/build/relay/submit/status/settlement by resolving the relay packet destination hash before reading status.

refund.reason: Intent settled; no refund path required for this canary.

mainnetPostUpgradeCanary.scope: post-upgrade create/deposit/redeem, Phoenix route, venue kill-switch, and post-fix Blend supply/withdraw accounting canaries
remaining: Vercel production deploy and production smoke/E2E
completed: post-upgrade factory create and share-token deployment
post-upgrade USDC deposit and partial redeem
post-fix Blend fixed XLM-USDC supply/withdraw accounting canary on fresh Arka

mainnetArkaAccountingPatch.reason: Blend withdraw can return fewer token base units than requested because of pool share rounding; Arka now credits actual token balance delta for receive actions.
